data.body:
DONE (committed 8fdd6ba3, b325da5f): generic 'list' now exposes the criteria list-epics filtered by — children_count field + --min-children + --unblocked/--blocked — wired at reads/CLI/library/MCP. 14 exhaustive tests (tests/interfaces/test_list_filters.py, 187 LOC): children_count presence/values/leaf/deleted-excluded; min-children boundary 3/1/0/99 + non-int validation; blocked=active-with-open-blocker, unblocked excludes blocked, transition-on-close; CLI<->library parity. test-ticket-list (30) + both list-epics suites + schema tier still green.

REMAINING — list-epics -> thin wrapper (warn + 1 epics call + 1 p0 call -> {p0_bugs,epics}). Coupled migration surface (do in lockstep): (1) library list_epics -> wrapper composing list_tickets(epic,status=open,in_progress,blocking_state=unblocked|'',min_children) + list_tickets(bug,priority=0); (2) list_epics.schema.json p0_bugs/epics items -> ticket_state arrays (drop the bespoke id/blocking/blocked/blockers projection — blocking-awareness now via the --blocked/--unblocked filter); (3) ListEpicsOut pydantic model -> {p0_bugs:[TicketStateOut], epics:[TicketStateOut]}; (4) interface test_list_epics_shape_and_exit_codes (no more exit 1/2); (5) dispatcher list-epics arm -> warn(stderr)+emit wrapper JSON; (6) retire ticket-list-epics.sh + ticket_list_epics fn + the bespoke suites (test-ticket-list-epics-{dispatcher,alias}.sh, test-ticket-deleted-not-counted-as-child.sh — coverage subsumed by test_list_filters.py + generic list).
